name: fresh-signature-accepted
description: Signature whose `created` ≤ `verifier_now` ≤ `expires`. Verifier MUST accept. This is the positive control for the replay-window suite — implementations that reject this are wrong, not the vector. The same request submitted twice on the same nonce store MUST be rejected on the second submission with `replayed_nonce`; the replay property is exercised by re-running this vector through the same Verifier instance.
replay_behaviour: A second verification of this same vector through the same Verifier (same nonce store) MUST reject with `replayed_nonce` (status 401).
